title: SurvivISLE
description:
A new, lightweight modpack where you are stuck on an Island!
What will you do?
body:
!['SurvivISLE' logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98dd82ad975b767c6f5b21338163ac7b62db9246.png)
Welcome to SurvivISLE, a new, lightweight modpack where you are on an Island and have to survive! Explore other islands, make a coconut shop, go fishing with your friends (if you have any) and even become a sailor!
![Sitting at a campfire on a campsite, some dogs in front of tents in view, the vast ocean in the distance...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f807728f9bfd6441f32d33ffd5f2781d8da3166d.png)

Since this pack uses VulkanMod, you can expect some graphical glitches. If these occur, like placed blocks being invisible, try using F3 + A or relog to fix.

Have fun, survivors!  
-StikyPiston :D
